evals.prompt: 我想用 Python 连接 Zemax，批量生成 .zos 文件，不需要看 GUI 实时变化。请告诉我应该用哪种连接方式并给出检查命令。
evals.expected_output: Selects Standalone Application mode, uses CreateNewApplication, runs scripts\zosapi_locator.py and scripts\standalone_ping.py, and asks for/pass --zemax-root when paths are not found.

evals.prompt: 我已经打开 OpticStudio，希望运行 Python 后能在 Lens Data Editor 里实时看到修改。interactive_ping 显示 NotAuthorized，界面只点了 Python > 交互扩展。
evals.expected_output: Explains that the independent ZOS-API.NET Interactive Extension button must be opened, the waiting dialog with Instance Number must stay open, then rerun interactive_ping.py with --instance.

evals.prompt: 运行下一个交互 demo 时提示 Refusing to replace the visible OpticStudio system，要怎么继续？
evals.expected_output: Tells the user to save the original lens, reopen/click the ZOS-API.NET Interactive Extension waiting dialog, and rerun the new program with --replace-current appended.
